keyEvents.text: Goal!  Honduras 0, Haiti 1. Frantzdy Pierrot (Haiti) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner.
Goal!  Honduras 1, Haiti 1. Jerry Bengtson (Honduras) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Maylor Núñez with a cross.
Substitution, Haiti. Jayro Jean replaces Carnejy Antoine.
Substitution, Haiti. Bryan Alcéus replaces Carl Sainté.
Goal!  Honduras 2, Haiti 1. José Pinto (Honduras) left footed shot from the left side of the six yard box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Jorge Álvarez with a through ball.
Substitution, Honduras. Bryan Acosta replaces Jerry Bengtson.
Substitution, Haiti. Fafá Picault replaces Danley Jean-Jacques.
Substitution, Honduras. Cristhian Altamirano replaces José Pinto.
